title: The Human Machine
description: A ramble about the fundamental distinction between the human brain and the Turing machine; discussing subjects such as semantics, quantum theory, and the CIA's declassified "Gateway" report. This is essentially a weird cousin to my previous essay, The Simulation Machine.

title: Doors in the Wall
subheading: Absurdism Vs. The Doors of Perception
description: A comparative analysis of the philosophies of The Myth of Sisyphus by Albert Camus, and The Doors of Perception by Aldous Huxley, in some sort of essay-adjacent format.

title: CUT SCRAMBLE REDIRECT
subheading: On the mechanics of mind control.

title: The Simulation Machine
subheading: A "philosophical" ramble about artificial life, semantics, objectivity, and the absurd.

title: That Odd State of the Soul
subheading: Read about the cut-up technique here.
